schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The "Coaching Help Scheme" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, offers an annual incentive to eligible students for tuition classes outside their school/college. The aim is to help academically bright students continue their studies without financial constraints.
schemeContent.benefits_md: **Financial Assistance:** ₹15,000/- per year for coaching expenses outside the school/college.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: - Education or tuition fees paid in school/college are not eligible for the scheme.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The "Coaching Help Scheme" provides financial support to non-reserved category students pursuing science in Standard-11 and Standard-12 by covering additional tuition costs.

children.text: The "Coaching Help Scheme" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, offers an annual incentive to eligible students for tuition classes outside their school/college. The aim is to help academically bright students continue their studies without financial constraints.
₹15,000/- per year for coaching expenses outside the school/college.
Education or tuition fees paid in school/college are not eligible for the scheme.
and navigate to the "Gujarat Unreserved Education and Economical Development Corporation" section under the Corporation menu.
Click on "Coaching Help Scheme" and then Apply Now.
Click on "New User? Please Register Here".
Enter the required details and click Register.
Enter your User ID, Password, and Captcha Code, then click "Login".
Read the scheme details carefully and click OK.
If your permanent address is correct, confirm it. Otherwise, enter your correct address.
Click Save & Next to proceed. Upload the relevant documents.
If you need to make changes, click "No, Cancel". If all details are correct, click "Yes, Submit".
Click Save Application. Note down your Application Number for future reference. You can also take a printout by clicking Print Application.

After submitting the online application, the applicant must take a printout of the application, sign it, and submit it along with all uploaded documents (certificates, mark sheets, etc.) to the concerned Deputy Director (Non-Reserved Category) or the District Social Welfare Officer through courier, post, or by visiting in person.

applicationProcess.process_md: > **Registration Process:** **Step 1:** Go to the Corporation's [official website](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/) and navigate to the "Gujarat Unreserved Education and Economical Development Corporation" section under the Corporation menu. **Step 2:**Click on "Coaching Help Scheme" and then Apply Now. **Step 3:** Click on "New User? Please Register Here". **Step 4:** Enter the required details and click Register. > **Application Process:** **Step 1:** Enter your User ID, Password, and Captcha Code, then click "Login". **Step 2:** Read the scheme details carefully and click OK. **Step 3:** If your permanent address is correct, confirm it. Otherwise, enter your correct address. **Step 4:** Click Save & Next to proceed. Upload the relevant documents. **Step 5:** If you need to make changes, click "No, Cancel". If all details are correct, click "Yes, Submit". **Step 6:** Click Save Application. Note down your Application Number for future reference. You can also take a printout by clicking Print Application. > **Check Application Status:** [Click here](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/ViewApplicationStatus.aspx). > **Post Online Application Procedure:** After submitting the online application, the applicant must take a printout of the application, sign it, and submit it along with all uploaded documents (certificates, mark sheets, etc.) to the concerned Deputy Director (Non-Reserved Category) or the District Social Welfare Officer through courier, post, or by visiting in person. > **Contact Us:** [Click here](https://gueedc.gujarat.gov.in/contact-us.html).

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant must belong to a non-reserved category.
   1. The applicant must have scored 70% or more in Standard 10th.
   1. The applicant must be currently studying in the science stream in Standard 11th or Standard 12th.
   1. The applicant’s annual family income should not exceed ₹4,50,000/-.

﻿
**Note:** The applicant can avail of the assistance only once per academic year.

children.text: The applicant must belong to a non-reserved category.
The applicant must have scored 70% or more in Standard 10th.
The applicant must be currently studying in the science stream in Standard 11th or Standard 12th.
The applicant’s annual family income should not exceed ₹4,50,000/-.
The applicant can avail of the assistance only once per academic year.
